title: Section 75
content: Except with the permission in writing of the 51[State Government], no Forest-officer shall, as principal or agent, trade in timber or other forest-produce, or be or become interested in any lease or any forest or in any contractfor working any forest, whether in or outside 53[the territories to which this Act extends].
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Provincial Government". 2. Subs. by the A.O. (No. 3) 1956, for "Part A States and Part C States".
